The '''''Star Roamer''''' was a medium [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] manufactured by [[Damorian Manufacturing Corporation/Legends|Damorian Manufacturing Corporation]]. It was owned by [[CorDuro Shipping]] and in [[26 ABY/Legends|26 ABY]] was used to deliver a shipment of [[Bacta/Legends|bacta]] to the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. They were intrigued by its healing properties, and would later try and sabotage its production using a virus carried by fallen [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Bey Gandan]].

However, the Yuuzhan Vong never received this bacta shipment as the ship was captured by [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and the [[Wild Knights]] to acquire [[Bacta tank/Legends|bacta tanks]] to heal the wounded [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Eelysa]]. CorDuro was suspected of collaborating with the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] so Solo felt no guilt in raiding it.

The [[Wild Knights]] boarded the ship and the crew subsequently surrendered and the ship was captured.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Recovery]]'' {{1st}}
